Hero.title: This dream didn't start today
Hero.subtitle: It started many years ago in the hands of those who taught us to work, believe and love. Today Antica M&M honors that timeless legacy.

About.boxTitle: Antica M&M was not born to sell coffee.
About.boxSubtitle: It was born to prove that southern Colombia has everything to live big.
About.boxText:
The best coffee in the world is born in these mountains.
For decades, we sent it abroad without ever keeping the best for ourselves.
Antica M&M changes that.
About.bodyParagraph1: We are a space designed with the same precision used to cultivate single-origin coffee in Huila. Every area of Antica was thought out so that whoever enters won't want to leave. So that specialty coffee has the stage it deserves. So that Pitalito has a place to be proud of.
About.bodyParagraph2: Antica M&M is a way of telling them: we did it and today this dream, belongs to everyone.
About.finalQuote: "In every decision, in every detail, their legacy is in the timeless love. In how we choose to honor their work."

Nosotros.heroSubtitle: The story of the Ortega family and the rebirth of coffee in Huila.
Nosotros.historyText: Luis Ortega didn't just plant coffee; he planted a vision. Since the 1970s, he transformed the mountains of Acevedo into a benchmark of quality, founding farms like Samaniego and La Fortuna that are now the heart of our production.

luis.title: Don Luis Ortega
luis.text: Pioneer and master. His life has been dedicated to modernizing cultivation and demonstrating that southern Colombia produces the best coffee in the world.

daughter.title: Antica's Vision
daughter.text:
Inspired by her father,
Maria Magdalena Ortega
created Antica M&M to give specialty coffee the stage it deserves: a meeting place and a source of regional pride.

victorious.title: Crezia: Export Coffee
victorious.text: Víctor Ortega leads Crezia Colombian Coffee, taking his father's technical legacy to international markets under global standards of excellence.

union.title: A Bridge Between Tradition and Future
union.text: Antica and Crezia are not just brands; they are the living tribute of two siblings to the work of a man who believed in his land.

family.title: Our Root: The Family
family.text: Behind every grain there is a family united by the aroma of coffee and commitment to Acevedo.

inauguration.title: The Dream Come True
inauguration.text:
This dream didn't start today… It started many years ago, in the hands of those who taught us to work, to believe… and Love.

Today, some of those people are no longer here. But everything they left us… remains here.

In every decision, in every detail, their legacy is in timeless love. In how we choose to honor their work.

Antica M&M is that. It is a way of telling them: we did it and today this dream, belongs to everyone.

Spaces.title: Our Spaces
Spaces.description: Discover the unique environments that make Antica a special place to enjoy unforgettable moments.
Spaces.heroSubtitle: Environments designed to create memorable experiences

space1.title: Main Hall
space1.description: Our main space combines elegance and comfort. With natural lighting, wooden furniture and details that evoke the warmth of the traditional coffee house.

space2.title: Outdoor Terrace
space2.description: An outdoor oasis where the aroma of coffee mixes with the fresh breeze. Perfect for enjoying a good book or a quiet conversation.

space3.title: Events Area
space3.description: Versatile space for special celebrations, coffee tastings, workshops and corporate events. Modern design with capacity for different configurations.
